description: ADR-2604102100 P5 follow-up — end-to-end pause/resume test for the agentic steerable loop. P1-P4 already shipped (workplan-executor polling, AgentInstruction state, CLI agent loop, pause/resume/stop handlers). This workplan covers the missing live-pipeline test gate so the loop is verified, not just compiled.

phases.description: Drive a task through the agent worker loop, pause it mid-flight via the steering API, resume it, and assert the original task completes with expected output.
phases.name: Pause/resume e2e test for agent worker steering

tasks.description: Add an integration test (hex-cli/tests/agent_steering_e2e.rs) that: (a) starts a hex-nexus instance against a temp STDB, (b) registers an agent + enqueues a long-running HexFlo task, (c) launches `hex agent worker` with a short --poll-interval, (d) issues POST /api/steering/{id}/event {pause}, asserts the worker logs 'Paused by steering', (e) issues POST /api/steering/{id}/event {resume}, asserts the worker resumes polling, (f) the task completes and the test asserts terminal status. Use existing test fixtures under hex-nexus/tests where possible.
tasks.name: Write agent_steering_e2e integration test

tasks.description: Once the e2e test is green, flip ADR-2604102100 P5 status to Done with the test path as evidence and remove the post-acceptance follow-up note.
tasks.name: Mark ADR-2604102100 P5 Done
